title: Move LICHEN Native UART discovery onto HAL serial-local API
description: Discovered while completing project-LICHEN-h7t5.4. lichen/lib/native/native.c still discovers lichen,native-uart directly with DT_HAS_CHOSEN/DEVICE_DT_GET. Convert the native transport library to use lichen_hal_serial_device_get() or an equivalent injected transport boundary without creating a fragile CMake/Kconfig dependency cycle. Acceptance: native_parse tests still pass, boards with lichen,native-uart/zephyr,uart-pipe/zephyr,slip-uart retain deterministic -ENOTSUP/-ENODEV behavior, and app code no longer needs native-transport devicetree knowledge.
notes:
Implementation: lichen/lib/native/native.c now obtains its transport with lichen_hal_serial_device_get() instead of direct DT_CHOSEN(lichen_native_uart) discovery. CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE now depends on CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL, native CMake explicitly includes the HAL public header path to avoid module-order include fragility, and native transport comments describe HAL serial-local precedence. Added lichen/tests/native_init qemu_x86 ztests covering no serial-local (-ENOTSUP), lichen,native-uart, zephyr,uart-pipe, and zephyr,slip-uart init success; each scenario calls lichen_native_init() twice to cover retry/idempotent behavior.
Validation EC2: instance i-01a96ddcebfc3b52d in us-east-2a with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr; primary worktree was dirty/behind and preserved; clean validation worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-xcxf-validate at origin/main plus patch. Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/native_parse -T lichen/tests/hal_serial_precedence -T lichen/tests/native_init -p qemu_x86 --outdir twister-out-xcxf --inline-logs --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result after final test change: 10/10 test configurations passed, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 skipped, 0 warnings in 166.63 seconds; 24 test cases executed. Scenarios passed: net.lichen.native_parse; five lichen.hal.serial_precedence variants; four net.lichen.native_init variants. Local static: git diff --check passed; rg found no remaining direct DT_CHOSEN(lichen_native_uart) discovery in lichen/lib/native.
Review: Russell explorer mapped native/HAL dependency hazards and identified module-order include risk; fixed with native CMake HAL include path. Zeno explorer identified native_init IPv6/L2 overreach; fixed with CONFIG_LICHEN_IPV6=n. Pascal review found no P0-P2 and one P3 for missing ENODEV coverage; Heisenberg review found no P0-P3 and suggested retry/idempotence coverage. Added duplicate lichen_native_init assertions for retry/idempotence. Residual: ENODEV path is not directly runtime-tested because HAL currently BUILD_ASSERTs that CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_SERIAL_LOCAL requires an okay chosen serial device; testing ENODEV would require relaxing that invariant or adding a non-ready serial device test fixture.
EC2 cleanup after validation: ran sync and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr on i-01a96ddcebfc3b52d; detached vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited for state=available; terminated i-01a96ddcebfc3b52d and waited for terminated; deleted temporary security group sg-0acc0aac34b48ce5b. Final volume state: available, Attachments=[] .
close_reason: Completed: native transport now uses HAL serial-local discovery, tests cover native-uart/uart-pipe/slip-uart/no-serial qemu paths, EC2 Twister and code reviews recorded.
